meaning: n.<日>花道(日本歌舞伎舞台右侧通道)
examples: It's great to pull off basketball techniques one up to the other like Hanamichi.
She introduced the forerunner of the hanamichi (path of flowers), a runway leading from the rear of the theatre and crossing between the audience to the stage.
Another speciality of the Kabuki stage is a footbridge (hanamichi) that extends into the audience.
